delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY in ('810','815')
update TransX set BusCat = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
update TransX set BusCat = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat > '34'

Insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,Flex1,Amt1) (select KeyID + '-save' as KeyID,t.Co as Co,m.ID as Flex1,round(sum(Amt1 * m.Field5),2) as Amt1 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'Val GL offset' and t.GL = m.Descr and t.BusCat like m.Field1 and t.TTY like m.Field2 and t.Co >= '1000' and t.Co < (case when m.Field6 = 'IFRS4' then '5990' else '6000' end)  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not m.Field6 = 'IFRS17' group by t.KeyID,t.Co,m.ID)

Insert into TransX (KeyID,Co,Flex1,Amt1) (select KeyID + '-save' as KeyID,'599x' as Co,m.ID as Flex1,round(sum(Amt1 * m.Field5),2) as Amt1 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'Val GL offset' and t.GL = m.Descr and t.BusCat like m.Field1 and t.TTY like m.Field2 and t.Co >= '5990' and t.Co <= '5999'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m.Field6 = 'IFRS17' group by t.KeyID,m.ID)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, Amt1, Flex1) (select KeyID + '-save', '2xxx' as Co, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, '5001' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('1480001','2310001')  and TTY = '807' and Co > '2000' and Co < '3000' group by KeyID)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, Amt1, Flex1,Flex2) (select KeyID + '-save', Co, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, '5002' as Flex1,'(' + GL + ') ' as Flex2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (substring(GL,1,2) in ('13','14','15','16','18','20','21','22','23','24') or substring(GL,1,3) in ('283','284','287')) and TTY = '991' and not substring(GL,6,2) in ('94','96') and not GL in ('1630000') and Co < '5990'  group by KeyID, Co, GL)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, Amt1, Flex1,Flex2) (select KeyID + '-save', Co, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, '5003' as Flex1, '(' + substring(GL,1,3) + 'xxxx) ' as Flex2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL >= '9000000' and GL < '9900000' group by KeyID,Co,substring(GL,1,3))

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, Amt1, Flex1,Flex2) (select KeyID + '-save', 'HudG' as Co, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, '5003' as Flex1, '(992xxxx) ' as Flex2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '992%' group by KeyID)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, Amt1, Flex1,Flex2) (select '[batchID]-save', 'HudG' as Co, round(sum(lc2_amt),2) as Amt1, '5005' as Flex1, 'The balance should net to zero for GLs starting with "992" for the Hudson companies and CCAT I/E' as Flex2 from CorpAcct_Apps.dbo.SAP_Ledger_Data where fiscal_year = '[Yr]' and period <= '[Mo]' and GL like '992%' and substring(cost_centre,4,1) in ('I','E'))
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-save' and Amt1 > -0.5 and Amt1 < 0.5
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set KeyID = '[batchID]' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-save'
update TransX set Flex2 = coalesce(t.Flex2,'') + m.Descr from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.Flex1 = m.ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'Val GL offset descr'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 > -5 and Amt1 < 5 and Co like '3%'
insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, BusCat, TTY, Amt1) values ('[batchID]',
